creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
On Sun, May 08, 2011 at 09:30:12PM +0300, Ion-Mihai Tetcu wrote:
> On Sun, 8 May 2011 15:21:02 +0200
> Juergen Lock <nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de> wrote:

> >[...]

> It's a WebCam Live! VF0050(a), luigi@'s gspca supports it (as well as
> webcamd).
> Here's a picture of it:
> http://www.pclaptop-review.com/laptop/creative-labs-webcam-live-vf0050-review/
> 
> > I also get a green garbled screen when I start skype without the Linux
> > v4l2convert.so LD_PRELOAD'ed (because the cam doesn't support yuv
> > video by itself), so doing the LD_PRELOAD should also fix it for
> > your cam. :)
> 
> Hm, question is what goes wrong with that. You're on i386 or amd64?

8.2 (+ patches), amd64, but I also did tests on pcbsd liveusb head
snapshots.
